name: Little One Hamster Feed – 400G
description: Packed with 21 delicious ingredients hamsters naturally enjoy, Little One Hamster Food offers a varied and tasty diet that encourages natural feeding behaviour while supporting long-term health and vitality. Why Choose Little One Hamster Food? Complete & Balanced Daily Nutrition This nutritionally balanced hamster food contains a diverse selection of grains, seeds, flakes, vegetables, and nuts designed to provide everything your hamster needs for a healthy and active lifestyle. Suitable for Standard & Dwarf Hamsters Little One Hamster Food is specially developed for both standard and dwarf hamster breeds, making it a versatile daily feeding option. Supports Healthy Digestion Enriched with fructooligosaccharides (FOS) and natural fibre sources, this formula helps support healthy digestion and balanced intestinal flora. It is also suitable for hamsters with sensitive stomachs. Rich Variety for Natural Feeding Behaviour The mix includes grains, puffed cereals, flakes, seeds, peanuts, dried vegetables, and carob to create a diverse texture and flavour combination that keeps feeding enjoyable and stimulating. Helps Reduce Unpleasant Odours Added yucca extract helps reduce unpleasant cage odours by naturally minimising waste smells. Key Benefits of Little One Hamster Food Complete daily food for hamsters Suitable for standard and dwarf hamsters Made with 21 tasty natural ingredients Supports healthy digestion and gut health Suitable for sensitive stomachs Rich in grains, seeds, nuts, and vegetables Encourages natural feeding behaviour Helps reduce cage odours with yucca extract Delicious taste hamsters love Main Ingredients Little One Hamster Food contains carefully selected ingredients including: Wheat Red millet White sorghum Barley Peeled oats Sunflower seeds Buckwheat Carob (4.25%) Pea flakes Maize flakes Peanuts Pumpkin seeds Dried carrot Sweet lupin flakes Fructooligosaccharides (FOS) Yucca extract Feeding & Storage Instructions Feeding Guide Provide fresh food daily and adjust portions according to your hamster’s size and activity level. Always ensure clean drinking water is available. Storage Store in a cool, dry place and reseal packaging after use to maintain freshness and quality. Ideal for Everyday Hamster Care Little One Hamster Food provides complete, balanced nutrition with a delicious variety of natural ingredients to help keep your hamster healthy, active, and happy every day.
shortDescription: Packed with 21 delicious ingredients hamsters naturally enjoy, Little One Hamster Food offers a varied and tasty diet that encourages natural feeding
